name: Buffalo & Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped green pepper and red pepper. Cook until slightly softened.
3. Add the sliced mushrooms and onions. Cook until the vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in the ground beef and buffalo meat. Break up any clumps and cook until no longer pink, about 5-7 minutes.
5. Add the crushed garlic. Cook for an additional minute.
6. Stir in the kidney beans (from the cans), crushed tomatoes, chili powder, and spices/herbs (such as oregano, cumin, basil, and cayenne). Mix well to combine.
7. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low. Cover and let it cook for about 30-45 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the liquid begins to evaporate and the chili thickens.
8. Skim off any excess fat if needed.
9. Continue cooking, uncovered, for an additional 1-2 hours, or until all flavors are well blended.
10. Serve hot with a side of starch and protein (such as brown rice, quinoa, or grilled chicken) to make one complete meal for 8-12 people.
